schema.name: ConfluenceAuditLogs_CL
schema.description: The Atlassian Confluence Audit Logs table contains audit logs from Atlassian Confluence that have been ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.

columns.name: EventVendor
columns.description: The vendor of the event.

columns.name: EventProduct
columns.description: The product of the event.

columns.name: AuthorUsername
columns.description: The username of the author.

columns.name: AuthorAccountId
columns.description: The account ID of the author.

columns.name: AuthorType
columns.description: The type of the author.

columns.name: AuthorDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the author.

columns.name: AuthorIsExternalCollaborator
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is an external collaborator.

columns.name: AuthorUserKey
columns.description: The user key of the author.

columns.name: AuthorAccountType
columns.description: The account type of the author.

columns.name: AuthorPublicName
columns.description: The public name of the author.

columns.name: AuthorExternalCollaborator
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is an external collaborator.

columns.name: RemoteAddress
columns.description: The remote address of the author.

columns.name: CreationDate
columns.description: The creation date of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Summary
columns.description: The summary of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: The description of the audit log entry.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: The category of the audit log entry.

columns.name: SysAdmin
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is a system administrator.

columns.name: SuperAdmin
columns.description: Indicates whether the author is a super administrator.

columns.name: AffectedObjectName
columns.description: The name of the affected object.

columns.name: AffectedObjectObjectType
columns.description: The type of the affected object.

columns.name: ChangedValues
columns.description: The changed values of the audit log entry.

columns.name: AssociatedObjects
columns.description: The associated objects of the audit log entry.

columns.name: UserIdentity
columns.description: The identity of the user.

columns.name: SrcUserName
columns.description: The source username.

columns.name: DstUserSid
columns.description: The destination user SID.

columns.name: SrcIpAddr
columns.description: The source IP address.

columns.name: EventCreationTime
columns.description: The creation time of the event.

columns.name: EventMessage
columns.description: The message of the event.

columns.name: EventCategoryType
columns.description: The category type of the event.
